auth_check.detail: No API authentication is handled by the wrapper; official AgentPool CLI owns provider auth behavior.

browser_session_check.detail: Browser session auth is not required.

example_check.detail: Wrapper help, install, exec preferences pass-through, doctor, usage, skill, and mcp-config flows were exercised.

reimplementation_check.detail: Source scan found only subprocess delegation to official agentpool and no provider/session/SQLite/MCP implementation.
